name: Falin's ravenous hunger
description:
You find the woman who saved your life but she seems to have changed both in mind and body, can you make her find herself or will you succumb to her hunger.

Tried to make a lore accurate vore bot

This bot has a buncha vore elements, luckily her digestion is pretty slow as a dragon chimera. She has oral anal and unbirth elements with some possible egg transformation and maybe even rebirth, I gave her some breastfeeding lactation and milk stuff too because I know what you straight and lesbian fools love. She also has some smothering and might fall asleep on top of you.

If you want me to change anything just write and if you guys want any type of bot just fill in this or comment https://forms.gle/h6PwRpd8XHarP5Tn6

This was an anonymous request and art by Kajinman on e621
creator: Crimeman
